message:
perf(dashboard): add output render caching and improve timing

Several performance and correctness improvements for the dashboard:

Render Caching:
- Added renderedOutputCache map to cache expensive glamour markdown
  rendering results per pane
- Cache is updated during agent status processing
- renderPaneDetail() now uses cached renders, falling back to fresh
  render only when cache miss occurs
- Reduces CPU usage when switching between panes frequently

Timing Fixes:
- Update lastBeadsFetch/lastCassContextFetch timestamps BEFORE starting
  the async fetch, not after. This prevents duplicate fetches when the
  previous fetch is still in flight (race window where timestamp check
  passes because fetch hasn't completed yet)

Model Name Resolution:
- Use configured default models (cfg.Models.DefaultClaude, etc.) instead
  of hardcoded model names ("opus", "gpt4")
- Preserves variant from pane status when available

Bounds Checking:
- RenderContextMiniBar now clamps percent to 0-100 range
- renderDetailContextBar also clamps to valid range
- Prevents rendering artifacts from invalid percentage values

UI Improvements:
- TokenVelocity pre-calculated in PaneStatus to avoid repeated
  computation during table rendering
- Alerts panel properly focuses/blurs based on panel selection
- History panel rendering order corrected

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
